title.en: Ye Tian was in a good mood at the moment.

content.en:
Conquering the spirit of Tongyang Pagoda is equivalent to controlling Tongyang Mountain.

Ye Tian was in a good mood at the moment.

"Transfer the authority of the Tongyang Mountain Formation to me!" Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes, master!"

The machine spirit truthfully handed over the permissions.

Soon, Ye Tian completely controlled all the magic circles in Tongyang Mountain.

Suddenly, he could perceive a place in Tongyang Mountain with a single thought, and many treasures were in his perception.

"The Boundary River Monument is here!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

However, Tongyang Mountain is now his territory, he can control the magic circle here, although he can't kill the controllers of the first and second realms, he can expel them and let them leave.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian's voice spread all over Tongyang Mountain.

"Tongyang Mountain is under my control, please leave. "

Then, under Ye Tian's control, one by one the controllers were moved out of Tongyang Mountain.

Several first- and second-level masters near the Boundary River Monument forcibly came here with their own strength, even if they were the previous Tongyang Pagoda Weapon Spirit, they couldn't help him.

But that is the strength of the Tongyang Pagoda Weapon Spirit, even if it controls the magic circle, it can't exert much power.

But Ye Tian is different, his power in controlling the magic circle is very powerful.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the circle descended, forcibly expelling the controllers from the force.

"The Tongyang Mountain Circle is controlled by other Eternal Controllers, who is it?"

The Eternal Masters were stunned.

"Hurry back!"

One by one, the controllers no longer resisted the magic circle here, and withdrew one by one.

There is only one true god in the eternal master, but he does not dare to fall here, and once he falls, he will die.

They didn't know who was in control of the Tongyang Mountain Array, in case it was a second-realm level controller, they would not be opponents, if the other party had murderous intentions, they would definitely die.

So, take advantage of the time to leave and escape. 、

In an instant, all the eternal controllers of Tongyang Mountain withdrew, and they stood around Tongyang Mountain one by one and looked at each other.

"Who controls Tongyang Mountain?"

A second-level master asked curiously.

He had been in Tongyang Mountain for a long time, and suddenly found that someone had controlled the boundary river monument in Tongyang Mountain.

You must know that it is very difficult to control Tongyang Mountain, if the strength is too strong, even if the magic circle of Tongyang Mountain cannot be stopped, it will take the means of ending up together, so that those top eternal controllers will not be able to gain anything.

And the strength is too weak, and they can't grasp the machine spirit at all, so they can only be like them and comprehend the boundary river monument.

"I don't know!"

"I don't know, it seems that there is no sign at all, and suddenly Tongyang Mountain is controlled by a certain eternal master. "

"You can take a peek into the plane here to see if any Eternal Masters have entered, but not come out. "

Immediately, these Eternal Masters peered into the past.

Soon.

They locked on to a masked Eight-Domain Master in the past time and space, and he was the only one who had entered, and he had not yet been removed.

Moreover, he had just entered and seemed to be injured.

It's just that the other party's speed was too fast at the beginning, and it crashed directly into Tongyang Mountain, so naturally no one paid attention.

"Who is this man?"

They are curious.

"Come on, your strength is too weak to spy on his true face in the past time and space figures, I am a second-realm level controller, I should be able to spy on his true face. "

The second-level controller said.

"Then let's take a hand from the Masters of the Year to satisfy our curiosity. "

The other Eternal Masters said.

That's right, if you want to satisfy your curiosity and recapture Tongyang Mountain, there must be no hope, and they don't have this idea.

Rumble!!!

Time and space are distorted, and the past time and space are revealed, and under the control of the time and space of the master of the year, time and space are peeled back layer by layer.

Finally, the mask on Ye Tian's body in the past time and space figure was peeled off, revealing his true face.

"What? this is the ???? of Tongyang's controller."

The Nian Controller said in confusion.

The other controllers are also dumbfounded, and the Tongyang controllers are back?

No, it should be said that the controller of Tongyang is alive?

"That's not right, the Tongyang Controller is dead, this is undoubtedly confirmed, many Eternal Controllers have spied on time and space to confirm, and at his level, he can't be resurrected at all, even if he is an Eternal Controller who is beyond the Ten Realms, he can't resurrect him!" said a Realm-level Controller.

"So there is only one possibility, a certain eight-domain level master disguised himself as a Tongyang master, and also disguised himself as a seriously injured and dying body, and entered Tongyang Mountain. Then after the machine spirit of Tongyang Mountain saw it, he brought this eight-domain level controller to heal his injuries, and the eight-domain level master took the opportunity to seize the machine spirit and control Tongyang Mountain. Although I can't get a glimpse of the past time and space inside Tongyang Mountain, this guess should be correct. The Nian Controller reasoned.

"That's okay, the machine spirit of Tongyang Mountain isn't so stupid, is it?"

One of the Eternal Masters wondered.

"It's a bit incredible, but it's the most plausible explanation. "

The Nian Controller said.

"Oh my God, I knew that the instrument spirit of Tongyang Mountain was so stupid, so I would use this method, maybe Tongyang Mountain is mine!"

"I regret it too, if I could really travel to the past time and space and stay there, I would definitely do it!"

"This eight-domain level controller is so lucky, just eight domain-level controllers have obtained a Tongyang Mountain, I'm afraid it's going to take off, and it will definitely be no problem to become a first-level controller in the future. "

"It's not clear who he is, but he'll definitely be exposed later, unless he never shows up. "

The Eternal Masters discussed for a long time before leaving.

In their opinion, the one who controls Tongyang Mountain is afraid that he will be practicing penance in Tongyang Mountain for a period of time and will not appear, so there is no need to wait here, it is a waste of time.

After a while, all the eternal controllers here left, and the lively Tongyang Mountain was no longer cared about.

And at this moment, Ye Tian was in the treasure house of Tongyang Mountain, investigating the treasures in the treasure house.

Although the Tongyang master fell and most of his treasures were on his body, so he was lost, but there were still some things in the treasure house of Tongyang Mountain, which was a little helpful to Ye Tian.

Of course, the biggest gain is this boundary river monument.

He had gone to see it before, and although the Boundary River Monument was still not the most complete, it was only missing a corner, and compared to the complete Boundary River Monument, the effect was almost the same.

"It's time to go to the Boundary River Monument, I hope that with the help of this Boundary River Monument, I can create an Origin Control Technique. "

Ye Tian said expectantly.
